name: Chrome DevTools MCP
description: Official Chrome DevTools MCP server. Gives AI coding agents browser debugging — inspect DOM, execute JS, capture screenshots, and trace network requests via CDP.

skills.name: DOM Inspection
skills.description: Inspect and query DOM elements, styles, and accessibility tree via Chrome DevTools Protocol

skills.name: JS Execution
skills.description: Execute JavaScript in the browser context and return structured results to the AI agent

skills.name: Network Tracing
skills.description: Capture and analyze network requests, responses, and performance timings during page interactions

skills.name: Screenshot Capture
skills.description: Take full-page or viewport screenshots and return them to the agent for visual inspection
